title: Friendly hint when vendor rejects input as policy/safety violation
forbidden_changes: Auto-enabling video for anthropic_messages without an explicit checkbox opt-in
Sending Authorization alongside x-api-key for Anthropic providers
Removing or weakening the OpenAI-style video_url block path
deliverables: VendorErrorKind enum (SafetyPolicy / ApiError / Other) wired through ErrorDisposition
user_hint() returning localized Chinese guidance per kind
compile_chunk_video emits: vendor message + (status, kind, request_id) + user hint for non-retryable errors
8 new unit tests covering vendor message extraction, request_id extraction, hint wording, and disposition formatting
acceptance_tests: cargo test --lib compile::client::tests:: passes (29 tests, 0 failed)
cargo test --lib compile:: passes (69 tests, 0 failed)
security_requirements: User-facing hint does not leak credentials or model internals beyond what the vendor already returned
Vendor request_id is preserved verbatim for support escalation
